conclusion: REAL-K8S-LAB-A cannot prove M1-K8S-LIVE-B under the current gate definition because Cluster API MachineDeployment is not installed, no configured infrastructure provider can prove real node pool scaling, and no schedulable node advertises nvidia.com/gpu.
